meta.title: Raha Cloud - Infrastructure, DevOps, Cloud
meta.description: We provide infrastructure and DevOps solutions based on AWS, Hetzner, and Arvancloud to reduce your team's operational overhead.

hero.title: Infrastructure that runs itself.
hero.subtitle: Raha Cloud helps teams reduce costs around maintaining and controlling infrastructure with DevOps solutions built on AWS, Hetzner, and Arvancloud.
hero.note: Offices in Tehran & Istanbul — serving clients worldwide

pillars.title: AWS
pillars.desc: Enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure and managed services.

pillars.title: Hetzner
pillars.desc: Cost-effective dedicated servers and cloud solutions.

pillars.title: Arvancloud
pillars.desc: Regional CDN, cloud, and edge services for MENA.

pillars.title: Hamravesh
pillars.desc: Iranian managed Kubernetes and PaaS infrastructure.

about.title: Infrastructure experts, cost optimizers
about.body: We are a team of DevOps engineers and cloud architects. We help teams build reliable infrastructure while reducing the overhead of maintenance and operations.
highlights: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform and Ansible

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: End-to-end infrastructure and DevOps services with clear deliverables, lower costs, and higher reliability.

items.title: Cloud Infrastructure
items.desc: Architecture and landing zones with security baselines and rollout plans on AWS, Hetzner, or Arvancloud.

items.title: DevOps & CI/CD
items.desc: Standardized pipelines with templates, quality gates, and safe rollback paths.

items.title: Kubernetes
items.desc: Production clusters with autoscaling, policy controls, and secure multi-tenant isolation.

items.title: Monitoring & Observability
items.desc: Dashboards, SLOs, and alert playbooks to shorten incident recovery time.

items.title: Self-hosted Tools
items.desc: Private GitLab, Sentry, PostgreSQL, and more with upgrades, backups, and hardening handled.

items.title: Container Orchestration
items.desc: Right-sized orchestration: Swarm or multi-node Docker Compose with hardening and upgrades.

steps.title: Assess
steps.desc: Audit your current infrastructure and identify optimization opportunities.

steps.title: Architect
steps.desc: Design scalable, cost-effective infrastructure tailored to your needs.

steps.title: Automate
steps.desc: Implement IaC, CI/CD, and monitoring to minimize manual operations.

items.title: E-commerce Platform
items.desc: Migration from on-premise to AWS with auto-scaling and CDN.

items.title: Fintech Startup
items.desc: Kubernetes cluster setup with GitOps deployment pipeline.
items.result: Deploy time reduced from hours to minutes

items.title: Media Company
items.desc: Hybrid Hetzner + Arvancloud setup for video streaming.

testimonials.title: What clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Hear from teams we've worked with

pitch.metaDescription: Raha Cloud company overview — infrastructure and DevOps that reduce cost and operational overhead on AWS, Hetzner, and Arvancloud.

cover.title: We make infrastructure invisible.
cover.subtitle: Raha Cloud is the DevOps team that designs, automates, and runs multi-cloud infrastructure — so product teams ship instead of firefight.

problem.title: Infrastructure shouldn't be a tax on your team.
problem.subtitle: Teams pour time and budget into keeping infrastructure alive instead of building product. We take that weight off.

items.title: Maintenance overhead
items.desc: Engineers spend their best hours patching servers and babysitting pipelines instead of shipping product.

items.title: Multi-cloud complexity
items.desc: Stitching together AWS, Hetzner, and regional providers turns into a fragile, undocumented web.

items.title: Unreliable operations
items.desc: Without SLOs, dashboards, and runbooks, every incident becomes a fire drill.

items.title: Runaway costs
items.desc: Over-provisioned, idle, and mispriced resources quietly inflate the monthly cloud bill.

vision.title: Every team deserves infrastructure that runs itself.
vision.body: Cloud is splintering across global hyperscalers and regional providers, and the operational burden is exploding. We believe infrastructure should be an invisible utility — reliable, automated, and cheap by default. Raha is building the team that owns that layer for companies across Iran, MENA, and beyond.
points: Multi-cloud is the new default, not the exception.
Operations should be automated, not heroic.
Cost discipline is an engineering practice, not a spreadsheet.

solution.title: One team for the whole infrastructure lifecycle.
solution.subtitle: From architecture to day-2 operations, we deliver end-to-end DevOps with clear deliverables, lower costs, and higher reliability.

market.title: A widening gap between cloud complexity and in-house skill.
market.body: Every growing company adopts cloud faster than it can hire senior infrastructure talent. That gap is widest where global and regional providers must coexist — exactly the multi-cloud reality we specialize in.

segments.title: Iran
segments.desc: Companies bridging local providers like Arvancloud and Hamravesh with global infrastructure under tight constraints.

segments.title: MENA
segments.desc: Regional businesses scaling on AWS and edge providers without large internal platform teams.

segments.title: Global
segments.desc: Cost-sensitive startups consolidating onto Hetzner and right-sized cloud.

model.title: Recurring revenue on top of high-trust engagements.

streams.title: Project engagements
streams.desc: Architecture, migration, and platform setup with fixed, outcome-based scopes.

streams.title: Managed operations
streams.desc: Monthly retainers for monitoring, on-call, upgrades, and reliability — predictable recurring revenue.

streams.title: Cost optimization
streams.desc: We cut cloud spend and share in the savings, aligning our upside with the client's.

why.title: Why we win.

items.title: Multi-cloud by default
items.desc: We design across AWS, Hetzner, Arvancloud, and Hamravesh — placing each workload where it runs best and cheapest.

items.title: Automation first
items.desc: Everything as code: Terraform, Ansible, CI/CD, and GitOps so infrastructure is repeatable and self-healing.

items.title: Regional reach
items.desc: Offices in Tehran and Istanbul let us serve Iran, MENA, and global clients with local context and compliance.

items.title: Cost-first engineering
items.desc: We right-size, consolidate, and re-architect to cut spend — typically 40% — without trading away reliability.

why.partnersNote: Deep, hands-on expertise across the platforms our clients actually run on:

closing.title: Let's build infrastructure that runs itself — together.
closing.subtitle: We're growing our client base, partner network, and team. If you operate infrastructure — or invest in the teams that do — let's talk.
